calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-26-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Alana G. Conner, Esq. for plaintiff Meinhard W. Marek, who is also present.
Linda Quinn, Esq. appearing on limited scope representation for defendants, Robert Hairell & Tamika Thorne who are present.

This cause came on regularly this date for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. Case settled. Parties entered into a signed Stipulation for Judgment and Settlement Agreement, which was then filed with the court. Settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 1025 Post Street, #41, San Francisco, CA 94109.

JPT Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (218)

Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Motio Nto Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. STEVEN C. WILLIAMS OF WIEGEL & FRIED, LLP, TEL. NO. 552-8230 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ROBERT HAIRELL AND TAMIKA THORNE, TEL. NO. 931-4038, DEFENDANTS APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS ROBERT HAIRELL AND TAMIKA THORNE'S Motion In Support Of Motion to Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is GRANTED. ANSWER TO BE FILED ON NOVEMBER 13, 2008. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Tamara Willat-Harrison, CSR # 4609 =301/PHA
